# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

BrowSync is currently maintained on the latest code in the default branch and the latest GitHub release.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| Latest default branch | Yes |
| Latest release | Yes |
| Older releases | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do not open a public issue.

Report it privately by email to `chentao1006@gmail.com` with:

- A description of the issue
- Steps to reproduce
- The affected BrowSync version
- Any proof-of-concept or logs that help confirm impact

I will acknowledge receipt within 7 days and will coordinate remediation and disclosure after a fix is available.
